1.gl: properly, to incline; by implication, to decline (of the slanting rays of evening); specifically, to pitch atent; gen. to encamp (for abode or siege)
1.kj: abide (in tents), camp, dwell, encamp, grow to an end, lie, pitch (tent), rest in tent.

1.gl: properly, to scrape (literally, to shave; but usually figuratively) together (i.e. to accumulate or increase) or away (i.e. to scatter, remove, or ruin; intransitively, to perish)
1.kj: add, augment, consume, destroy, heap, join, perish, put.

1.gl: to strike with more or less violence (beat, fell, corrode); by implication (of attack) to knock together, i.e. surround or circulate
1.kj: compass (about, -ing), cut down, destroy, go round (about), inclose, round.

19.kj: add, [idiom] again, [idiom] any more, [idiom] cease, [idiom] come more, [phrase] conceive again, continue, exceed, [idiom] further, [idiom] gather together, get more, give more-ove

19.gl: depressed (figuratively), in mind (gentle) or circumstances (needy, especially saintly)
19.kj: humble, lowly, meek, poor. Compare H6041 (עָנִי).
19.dv: or (by intermixture with H6041 (עָנִי)) עָנָיו; from H6031 (עָנָה);

19.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
19.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

19.gl: properly, to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion), i.e. usually rejoice, or (as cringing) fear
19.kj: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice.
19.dv: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root;

19.kj: [idiom] exceeding(-ly), gladness, joy(-fulness), mirth, pleasure, rejoice(-ing).

19.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
19.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

20.gl: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
20.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

20.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)
20.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan

20.gl: strictly nothingness; also trouble. vanity, wickedness; specifically an idol
20.kj: affliction, evil, false, idol, iniquity, mischief, mourners(-ing), naught, sorrow, unjust, unrighteous, vain, vanity, wicked(-ness). Compare H369 (אַיִן).
20.dv: from an unused root perhaps meaning properly, to pant (hence, to exert oneself, usually in vain; to come to naught);

20.gl: properly, to make mouths at, i.e. to scoff; hence (from the effort to pronounce a foreign language) to interpret, or (generally) intercede
20.kj: ambassador, have in derision, interpreter, make a mock, mocker, scorn(-er, -ful), teacher.

20.gl: to be alert, i.e. sleepless; hence to be on the lookout (whether for good or ill)

20.kj: mighty, oppressor, in great power, strong, terrible, violent.

21.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
21.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph

21.gl: to stretch or spread out; by implication, to bend away (including moral deflection); used in a great variety of application
21.kj: [phrase] afternoon, apply, bow (down, -ing), carry aside, decline, deliver, extend, go down, be gone, incline, intend, lay, let down, offer, outstretched, overthrown, pervert, pitc

21.gl: properly, to miss; hence (figuratively and generally) to sin; by inference, to forfeit, lack, expiate, repent, (causatively) lead astray, condemn
21.kj: bear the blame, cleanse, commit (sin), by fault, harm he hath done, loss, miss, (make) offend(-er), offer for sin, purge, purify (self), make reconciliation, (cause, make) sin(-ful

21.gl: to be right (i.e. correct); reciprocal, to argue; causatively, to decide, justify or convict
21.kj: appoint, argue, chasten, convince, correct(-ion), daysman, dispute, judge, maintain, plead, reason (together), rebuke, reprove(-r), surely, in any wise.

21.gl: a desolation (of surface), i.e. desert; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain
21.kj: confusion, empty place, without form, nothing, (thing of) nought, vain, vanity, waste, wilderness.
21.dv: from an unused root meaning to lie waste;

21.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
21.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

22.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
22.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
22.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

22.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

22.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
22.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

22.gl: properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now
22.kj: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder.
22.dv: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא);

22.gl: properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed
22.kj: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.

22.gl: to sever, i.e. ransom; gener. to release, preserve
22.kj: [idiom] at all, deliver, [idiom] by any means, ransom, (that are to be, let be) redeem(-ed), rescue, [idiom] surely.

23.gl: a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),
23.kj: ([phrase] be) able, [idiom] about, [phrase] armholes, at, axletree, because of, beside, border, [idiom] bounty, [phrase] broad, (broken-) handed, [idiom] by, charge, coast, [phrase
23.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

23.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
23.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

23.gl: properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
23.kj: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out

23.gl: an action (good or bad); generally, a transaction; abstractly, activity; by implication, a product (specifically, a poem) or (generally) property
23.kj: act, art, [phrase] bakemeat, business, deed, do(-ing), labor, thing made, ware of making, occupation, thing offered, operation, possession, [idiom] well, (handy-, needle-, net-) wo

23.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
23.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

23.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
23.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

24.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
24.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

24.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
24.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

24.gl: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
24.kj: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

24.gl: properly, something received, i.e. (mentally) instruction (whether on the part of the teacher or hearer); also (in an active and sinister sense) inveiglement
properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)
24.kj: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).
